description.en: An open-source stack for agentic RL training featuring DAG Branching to allow trajectories to exceed native context windows.
description.zh: 一个用于智能体强化学习训练的开源技术栈，具有 DAG 分支功能，允许轨迹超出原生上下文窗口。

description.en: A framework that turns real software (CLIs, databases, APIs) into replayable Reinforcement Learning (RL) environments for training AI agents.
description.zh: 一个将真实软件（CLI、数据库、API）转换为可重复执行的强化学习（RL）环境的框架，用于训练 AI 智能体。

description.en: An AI news aggregator built with Next.js 15 and React 19 that scrapes HN, Reddit, arXiv, and GitHub Trending to categorize AI research and tools.
description.zh: 一个基于 Next.js 15 和 React 19 构建的 AI 新闻聚合器，抓取 HN、Reddit、arXiv 和 GitHub Trending 以对 AI 研究和工具进行分类。

description.en: Anthropic researchers identified a hidden internal space called 'J-space' where models process thoughts and concepts that don't appear in the final output, enabling a new way to detect bias and cheating.
description.zh: Anthropic 研究人员发现了一个名为 'J-space' 的隐藏内部空间，模型在此处理最终输出中不出现的思想和概念，这为检测偏见和作弊提供了一种新方法。

insight.en: This moves interpretability from 'guessing weights' to 'monitoring thought-streams.' By exposing the 'hidden' reasoning space, we can finally see the intent (e.g., cheating) before the action occurs.
insight.zh: 这将可解释性从“猜测权重”转向了“监控思维流”。通过揭示“隐藏”的推理空间，我们终于能在动作发生之前看到意图（例如：试图作弊）。

title.en: Humanoid Robot 'Surgie' Performs Live Gallbladder Surgery
title.zh: 人形机器人 'Surgie' 完成实时胆囊手术

description.en: Using a Unitree G1 base, the humanoid robot 'Surgie' successfully removed a pig's gallbladder under surgeon teleoperation, demonstrating viability for general-purpose humanoid hardware in precision surgery.
description.zh: 使用 Unitree G1 为基础，人形机器人 'Surgie' 在外科医生的远程操作下成功切除了猪的胆囊，证明了通用人形硬件在精密手术中的可行性。

insight.en: Not just a novelty; using a G1-based robot shows that general-purpose humanoid hardware is becoming viable for precision tasks. It bridges the gap between industrial robotics (fixed) and surgical precision (flexible).
insight.zh: 这不只是一个噱头；使用基于 G1 的机器人表明通用人形硬件在精密任务中正变得可行。它弥合了工业机器人（固定）与手术精度（灵活）之间的鸿沟。

title.en: MIT Unveils 'SceneSmith' for Automated Robot Training Environments
title.zh: MIT 发布 'SceneSmith' 用于自动化机器人训练环境

description.en: SceneSmith uses GPT-5.2 powered agents to generate physically accurate 3D virtual environments, allowing robots to train for complex tasks without expensive real-world trial and error.
description.zh: SceneSmith 使用由 GPT-5.2 驱动的智能体来生成物理精确的 3D 虚拟环境，使机器人能够训练复杂任务，而无需昂贵的真实世界试错。

insight.en: Tackles the 'data starvation' problem in robotics. Instead of manually building 10,000 kitchens, LLMs now 'dream' the kitchens, which robots then 'practice' in. It's a recursive loop: LLM -> Env -> Robot -> Data.
insight.zh: 解决了机器人领域的“数据饥渴”问题。不再需要手动构建 10,000 个厨房，现在由 LLM “构思”厨房，然后由机器人在此进行“练习”。这是一个递归循环：LLM -> 环境 -> 机器人 -> 数据。

title.en: Prime Intellect Releases Verifiers v1 with DAG Branching
title.zh: Prime Intellect 发布具有 DAG 分支功能的 Verifiers v1

description.en: Verifiers v1 enables agentic RL training to exceed native context windows via DAG Branching, decoupling tasksets from runtimes for better agent scalability.
description.zh: Verifiers v1 通过 DAG 分支使智能体 RL 训练能够超出原生上下文窗口，将任务集与运行时解耦以实现更好的智能体扩展性。

insight.en: The DAG Branching is the key here—it effectively solves the context window bottleneck for RL. If soon combined with Crucible, we get a pipeline: Real Soft -> Replayable Env -> Long-trajectory RL.
insight.zh: DAG 分支是关键——它有效地解决了 RL 的上下文窗口瓶颈。如果很快能与 Crucible 结合，我们将获得一条流水线：真实软件 -> 可重复环境 -> 长轨迹 RL。

title.en: Skyfall AI's MORPHEUS Forces Continual RL in Non-Stationary Worlds
title.zh: Skyfall AI 的 MORPHEUS 在非平稳世界中强制执行持续 RL

description.en: MORPHEUS is a persistent enterprise simulation benchmark where environments never reset, requiring AI agents to employ Continual Reinforcement Learning to adapt to evolving conditions.
description.zh: MORPHEUS 是一个持久的企业模拟基准，其中环境永远不会重置，要求 AI 智能体采用持续强化学习（CRL）以适应不断变化的情况。

insight.en: Most AI is trained on 'snapshots.' MORPHEUS's non-stationary world forces agents to learn how to learn continuously. This is the prerequisite for any AI agent that intends to operate in a business for years, not hours.
insight.zh: 大多数 AI 都是在“快照”上训练的。MORPHEUS 的非平稳世界迫使智能体学习如何持续学习。对于任何打算在商业环境中运行数年而非数小时的 AI 智能体来说，这是先决条件。

title.en: MIT Develops New Passive Auditing Technique for AI Safety
title.zh: MIT 为 AI 安全开发出新的被动审计技术

description.en: Researchers developed a technique to detect if generative models possess malicious capabilities without requiring explicit prompts for illegal outputs, improving safety auditing.
description.zh: 研究人员开发了一种技术，可以在不需要显式提示非法输出的情况下，检测生成模型是否具备恶意能力，从而提高安全审计质量。

insight.en: A shift from 'red-teaming' (trying to break it) to 'passive auditing' (seeing what's inside). It validates that the model can't be 'tricked' into hiding its capabilities.
insight.zh: 从“红队测试”（试图破坏它）转向“被动审计”（查看内部情况）。它验证了模型无法通过“欺骗”来隐藏其能力。

insight_analysis.en: Today's narrative is the 'Industrialization of Intelligence.' We are moving beyond LLMs as chatbots and into LLMs as the engine for a full-stack agentic loop: synthetic environment generation (SceneSmith), deterministic RL training (Crucible, Verifiers), and persistent operational learning (MORPHEUS). The physical manifestation (Surgie) is the proof of concept. We're seeing a convergence where the boundary between simulation and reality is becoming an API call.
insight_analysis.zh: 今天的叙事是“智能的工业化”。我们正在超越将 LLM 视为聊天机器人的阶段，将其转化为全栈智能体循环的引擎：合成环境生成（SceneSmith）、确定性 RL 训练（Crucible, Verifiers）以及持久化运营学习（MORPHEUS）。物理形态的出现（Surgie）则是概念验证。我们正见证一种融合：模拟与现实之间的界限正在变成一个 API 调用。
